import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{toast}from'react-hot-toast';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import'./Forms.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const{login}=useAuth();const[formData,setFormData]=useState({email:'',password:''});const{email,password}=formData;const onChange=e=>{setFormData({...formData,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});};const onSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{// ✅ CORREGIDO: Ruta relativa
